case_title: NASSER, MANSOUR VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (DENNIS J. HERRERA)

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF INFORMAL BRIEF FILED BE DEFT. CITY AND COUNTY OF SF. (SENT TO COURT FOR HEARING ON 6/23/05.
